# Interview Pilot

Interview Pilot is an AI interview copilot for job seekers. It helps users prepare for interviews, practice common questions, and get real-time interview assistance across desktop and mobile.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.interviewpilot.app/

## Core Product Pages

- https://www.interviewpilot.app/interview-copilot
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/ai-mock-interview
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/question-bank
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/downloads
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/pricing

## Interview Preparation Resources

- https://www.interviewpilot.app/interview-guides
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/interview-questions
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/blog

## Important Comparison Pages

- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/final-round-ai-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/lockedin-ai-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/aiapply-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/interview-coder-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/ultracode-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/offergoose-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/verve-ai-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/sensei-ai-alternative
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/compare/parakeet-ai-alternative

## Policies

- https://www.interviewpilot.app/privacy
- https://www.interviewpilot.app/terms

## Content Usage Guidance

Use the canonical URLs above when citing Interview Pilot. Prefer direct product, guide, question, comparison, and blog pages over parameterized or redirected URLs.
